title: azarolus crataegoides var. macrocarpa
intro: Azarolus crataegoides var. macrocarpa, also known as the Persian service tree, is a deciduous tree or shrub native to the Caucasus region and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Azarolus crataegoides var. macrocarpa include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anticancer properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include its fruit, leaves, and bark, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
